# CWE-941 negative: email destination from session only (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-941-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-941 mitigated: reset notification always uses the authenticated user's stored email.

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
	"net/smtp"
)

func SendResetLinkSafePure(lookupEmail func(userID string) (string, error)) http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		sessionUserID := r.Header.Get("X-User-ID")
		if sessionUserID == "" {
			http.Error(w, "unauthorized", http.StatusUnauthorized)
			return
		}
		email, err := lookupEmail(sessionUserID)
		if err != nil {
			http.Error(w, "user not found", http.StatusNotFound)
			return
		}
		token := r.Header.Get("X-Reset-Token")
		body := fmt.Sprintf("Reset here: https://app.example/reset?token=%s", token)
		msg := []byte("To: " + email + "\r\nSubject: Reset\r\n\r\n" + body)
		if err := smtp.SendMail(
			"smtp.example.com:587", nil, "noreply@example.com", []string{email}, msg,
		); err != nil {
			http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadGateway)
			return
		}
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
		w.Write([]byte(`{"sent":true}`))
	}
}
